name: teamwork-skill
description: Codex-first skills, with Cursor and Claude Code adapters, for evidence-grounded research, debugging, planning, execution, review, and long-running goals.

interface.shortDescription: Evidence-grounded teamwork for complex Codex research and engineering.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-first skill package for research, reproducible debugging, reviewable planning, scoped execution, fresh review, and long-running goals. A plan is optional; authority is separate from plan acceptance. Verify only the changed path or a named protected boundary. Re-enter Plan only when new evidence changes accepted scope or criteria. Fresh review only when the user asks or an accepted risk gate requires it. Simple work stays on the native fast path; independent subagents are used only when they improve the result. Host-native interaction tools remain in control.
defaultPrompt: Use $teamwork-update to enable full Teamwork for this Codex plugin.
Research this problem from primary sources and project evidence, then recommend the next safe action.
Execute authorized scope. Plans are optional. Verify changed path or named boundary; review only if requested or risk-gated.
